title: Hiring Medical Officer at Ruby Hall Clinic

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Ruby Hall Clinic
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
